output.sparql:
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT(YEAR(?eventTime) AS ?year) WHERE {
  ?game wdt:P361 wd:Q1439106 ; wdt:P31 wd:Q384820 ; wdt:P585 ?eventTime ; wdt:P1545 ?winner .
  ?winner rdfs:label ?winnerLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?winnerLabel) = 'en')
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(?winnerLabel) , 'army'))
}
ORDER BY DESC(?eventTime)
LIMIT 1
